# Comym

> Human-Centered Design. AI-Powered Systems.

Comym is the portfolio of Gabriel Comym, a product designer and creative working across AI-powered systems, machine learning, GenAI, agentic applications and design direction for technical products.

## Primary page

- https://comym.co/

## Contact

- Email: mailto:gabrielcomym@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gabrielcomym/
- GitHub: https://github.com/gabrielcomym
- Medium: https://gabrielcomym.medium.com/

- WovenLight / Rapid Diagnostic Reports: https://comym.co/work/wovenlight-rapid-diagnostic-reports/
- WovenLight / Rebranding: https://comym.co/work/wovenlight-rebranding/
